visual_description: A man in a dark suit and white shirt rides a bicycle on a paved road, leaning forward as he pedals. Two white Jeeps follow behind him, traveling in the same direction on the winding road. The scene is set outdoors with mountains and trees in the background under a clear blue sky.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice singing in a neutral tone, with a moderate pitch and pace, accompanied by background music.
